meaning: n.索罗亚斯德教,拜火教,袄教,火教,火袄教,明教
examples: In Zoroastrianism, the elements are sacred and the body is corrupt.
The chief deity of Zoroastrianism, the creator of the world, the source of light, and the embodiment of good.
After centuries of obscurity, the ancient faith of Zoroastrianism had a new visibility, and a symbolic standard to raise.
